title: Grilled Shaggy Australian Peanut Cookies Tagine
description: A hearty, low-carb-friendly dessert featuring peanut cookies cooked in a traditional tagine. This recipe is perfect for a cozy evening in.
instructions: Line a tagine with parchment paper.
Arrange peanut cookies on the paper.
Drizzle with coconut oil, then sprinkle with almond flour, granulated sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk eggs and vanilla extract, then drizzle over peanut cookies.
Garnish with fresh rosemary and peanuts.
Transfer the tagine to the oven and bake for 20 minutes.
While the cookies cook, melt ghee in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add honey to the saucepan and whisk until dissolved.
Remove the tagine from the oven and brush cookies with the ghee-honey mixture.
Return the tagine to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove the tagine from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with additional fresh rosemary and peanuts if desired.
